eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: EIP-8025 (Optional ZK Proofs) formally proposed for Hegota by Ignacio and Francesco; YouTube and slides linked

protocol_spec_and_standards.highlight: zkEVM guest API: 7 standards accepted; static library/linker script standard moving to merge (ZISK agreed); 3 new drafts open for review: ELF loading, accelerated memory ops (memcpy/memmove/memset/memcmp), and write_log diagnostic
Francesco: block IR (ELIR) proposed as intermediate representation of EL host behaviors to aid formal verification; presented to FV group
Recursive proof scheme proposed for weak subjectivity sync: reduces proof download from ~54 GB to K proofs for head block; PR open for review

security_and_compliance.highlight: Blog post published on SP1 formal verification effort: 11 base RV64IM instructions lack compliance coverage; RISC-V spec compliance now fully met by LambdaVM; ZISK near-compliant (fence edge case); OpenVM compliant release imminent
Ignacio found two security bugs while auditing codebases: soundness bug in ZISK (fixed in v0.18), and potential OOM critical bug in libSSE from lambdaclass

testing_and_infrastructure.highlight: Execution witness spec: releases 040+ include schema ID prefix, enriched chain config, and properly filled public key hints; Hive dashboard now running execution witness compliance tests; only ethrex integrated so far
EF proving cluster live; RISC-V distributed prover benchmark tools set up; initial mainnet and EST block benchmarks running; concrete numbers deferred to next call

Blocking Blobs (EIP-8025-adjacent): prototype underway in ethrex and Lighthouse by Peter (Scroll); spec issues found, draft PR submitted; DevNet end-to-end flow targeted; ethrex team (Ivan) also planning near-term contribution

evm_formal_verification.highlight: EVMASM (EVM in Lean4 assembly): 110 opcodes formally proved; STF modeling in progress (accounts, storage, EIP-1559 tx, call frames); targeting ZISK emulator for full ELF extraction; round-trip RISC-V tests in CI

action_items.action: Review three open zkEVM guest API standard PRs: ELF loading, accelerated memory ops, write_log
Integrate engine_newPayloadWithWitness v5 on an official EL repo branch to join Hive execution witness dashboard
Review recursive proof / weak subjectivity sync PR and write-up; provide feedback
action_items.owner: CL client teams and zkEVM contributors

decisions.decision: EIP-8025 (Optional ZK Proofs for Hegota) formally entered into the Hegota proposal process; PFI for Hegota

targets.target: Next execution witness spec release based on Glamsterdam devnet-5 or devnet-6
Blocking Blobs DevNet (ethrex + Lighthouse prototype) — timeline TBD, targeted as soon as spec issues resolved
